name: Ubuntu 24.04 Test Environment
postCreateCommand:
echo '
\033[1;32m=== Clean Ubuntu 24.04 Environment Ready ===\033[0m

Two users available:
  - ubuntu (default, UID 1000) - matches Oracle Cloud
  - psoland (UID 1001) - dedicated user with SSH access

To test the setup:

  1. Run the bootstrap script:
     ./bootstrap/ubuntu-vm.sh

  2. Start a new shell (for Nix):
     exec bash

  3. Apply home-manager:
     cd ~/os-config
     nix run home-manager/master -- switch --flake .#ubuntu-vm
     # OR for psoland: nix run home-manager/master -- switch --flake .#psoland-vm

  4. Switch to zsh:
     chsh -s $(which zsh)
     exec zsh

Note: Tailscale will show errors (expected in container)
'
